ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein structure */,
  "template" TEXT /* PDB template identifier for the protein structure */,
  "seq_identity" REAL /* Percentage of sequence identity */,
  "oligo_state" TEXT /* Oligomeric state of the protein (e.g., monomer, dimer) */,
  "found_by" TEXT /* Method used to find the protein structure (e.g., HHblits, BLAST) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Experimental method used to determine the structure (e.g., X-ray) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the structure in Angstroms */,
  "seq_similarity" REAL /* Sequence similarity score */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the sequence alignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein structure */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the protein structure */,
  "chain_id" TEXT /* Chain ID of the protein structure */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  "biological_process" TEXT /* Biological process the protein is involved in */,
  "cellular_component" TEXT /* Cellular component the protein is located in */,
  "molecular_function" TEXT /* Molecular function of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structure_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "seq_identity_min" REAL /* Minimum sequence identity for the search */,
  "seq_identity_max" REAL /* Maximum sequence identity for the search */,
  "oligo_state" TEXT /* Oligomeric state filter for the search */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method filter for the search */,
  "resolution_min" REAL /* Minimum resolution for the search */,
  "resolution_max" REAL /* Maximum resolution for the search */,
  "seq_similarity_min" REAL /* Minimum sequence similarity for the search */,
  "seq_similarity_max" REAL /* Maximum sequence similarity for the search */,
  "coverage_min" REAL /* Minimum coverage for the search */,
  "coverage_max" REAL /* Maximum coverage for the search */,
  "description_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords in the description for the search */,
  "biological_process" TEXT /* Biological process filter for the search */,
  "cellular_component" TEXT /* Cellular component filter for the search */,
  "molecular_function" TEXT /* Molecular function filter for the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structure_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "search_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search that produced this result */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure in the result */,
  "ranking_score" REAL /* Ranking score of the protein structure in the search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  "biological_process" TEXT /* Biological process the protein is involved in */,
  "cellular_component" TEXT /* Cellular component the protein is located in */,
  "molecular_function" TEXT /* Molecular function of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structure_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., functional site, binding site) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structure_literature" (
  "literature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literature reference */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure being referenced */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("literature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the download */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the download occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id")
)
